items.title: Constellation invests in Blue Energy
items.blurb: Blue Energy - a developer of financeable, prefabricated nuclear power plants - has announced a strategic equity investment from Constellation Technology Ventures, the venture arm of Constellation, operator of the…

items.title: Nano Nuclear joins Virginia nuclear energy consortium By Investing.com
Aalo-X 10-MWe test reactor taps Rockwell control platform to speed nuclear deployment
items.blurb: Rockwell will provide industrial controls for Aalo's Aalo-X reactor as the SMR developer advances toward commercial power.
